untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit volume moving average (10-day MA of volume) and differentiation between 20% threshold (trend confirmation) vs 40% threshold (price extremes). Available indicator vol_ratio_20 is a generic volume ratio but does not specify the exact 10-day MA basis or allow dual thresholds. The signal also requires directional inference from volume extremes (not provided). Approximated using vol_ratio_20 > 1.2 as a proxy for 20% increase, but cannot accurately model the 40% extreme detection or trend direction context.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN signal uses volume MA smoothing as a trend-confirmation filter. Mapped 20% threshold to vol_ratio_20 > 1.2 (decimal scale). The 40% extreme threshold and context-dependent direction logic cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. Recommend implementing custom volume MA indicator (SMA of volume series) and dual-threshold logic in backtest engine for full fidelity.
